facts.context: Which best describes the structure of an atom?
facts.truth: a massive core surrounded by negatively-charged particles
distractors: a lightweight core surrounded by neutral particles

facts.context: A bond is formed when an electron is transferred from a sodium atom to a chlorine atom. What happens to the sodium atom during this process?

distractors: The mass of the atom increases.

distractors: People relied on bandages more than doctors.

distractors: The properties of both sodium and chlorine remain the same.

facts.context: If you took all of the atoms out of a chair, what would be left?

by switching the colors of the marbles
